ammo_generic.BaseClass: Mandatory, Angles, CAmmoGeneric, CBaseAmmo, CBaseItem, Target, FireTargets, CBaseDelay, hullsize, rendersettings, CReplacemetFile, appearflags
ammo_generic.title: Generic Ammo
ammo_generic.description: Gives the specified ammo type to the player that picks it up.

notes.1: Combine with trigger_changekeyvalue to dynamically change ammo type
